subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Júd! Upon thee be My glory! The letter of His Honor 'Alí-Ḥaydar, upon him be My glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم جود علیک بهائی نامه جناب علی حیدر علیه بهائی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @contention and conflict, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @call to action
